"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as RechartsPrimitive from "recharts"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

// Format: { THEME_NAME: CSS_SELECTOR }
const THEMES = { light: "", dark: ".dark" } as const

export type ChartConfig = {
  [k in string]: {
    label?: React.ReactNode
    icon?: React.ComponentType
  } & (
    | { color?: string; theme?: never }
    | { color?: never; theme: Record<keyof typeof THEMES, string> }
  )
}

type ChartContextProps = {
  config: ChartConfig
}

const ChartContext = React.createContext<ChartContextProps | null>(null)

function useChart() {
  const context = React.useContext(ChartContext)

  if (!context) {
    throw new Error("useChart must be used within a <ChartContainer />")
  }

  return context
}

const ChartContainer = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
    config: ChartConfig
    children: React.ComponentProps<
      typeof RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer
    >["children"]
  }
>(({ id, className, children, config, ...props }, ref) => {
  const uniqueId = React.useId()
  const chartId = `chart-${id || uniqueId.replace(/:/g, "")}`

  return (
    <ChartContext.Provider value={{ config }}>
      <div
        data-chart={chartId}
        ref={ref}
        className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "flex",
            aspectRatio: "aspect-video",
            justifyContent: "justify-center",
            fontSize: "text-xs",
            "[&_.recharts-cartesian-axis-tick_text]": {
                fill: "[&_.recharts-cartesian-axis-tick_text]:fill-muted-foreground",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-cartesian-grid_line[stroke='#ccc']]": {
                strokeWidth: "[&_.recharts-cartesian-grid_line[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border/50",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-curve.recharts-tooltip-cursor]": {
                strokeWidth: "[&_.recharts-curve.recharts-tooltip-cursor]:stroke-border",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-dot[stroke='#fff']]": {
                stroke: "[&_.recharts-dot[stroke='#fff']]:stroke-transparent",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-layer]": {
                outlineStyle: "[&_.recharts-layer]:outline-none",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-polar-grid_[stroke='#ccc']]": {
                strokeWidth: "[&_.recharts-polar-grid_[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-radial-bar-background-sector]": {
                fill: "[&_.recharts-radial-bar-background-sector]:fill-muted",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-rectangle.recharts-tooltip-cursor]": {
                fill: "[&_.recharts-rectangle.recharts-tooltip-cursor]:fill-muted",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-reference-line_[stroke='#ccc']]": {
                strokeWidth: "[&_.recharts-reference-line_[stroke='#ccc']]:stroke-border",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-sector[stroke='#fff']]": {
                stroke: "[&_.recharts-sector[stroke='#fff']]:stroke-transparent",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-sector]": {
                outlineStyle: "[&_.recharts-sector]:outline-none",
            },
            "[&_.recharts-surface]": {
                outlineStyle: "[&_.recharts-surface]:outline-none",
            },
        })}
        {...props}
      >
        <ChartStyle id={chartId} config={config} />
        <RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer>
          {children}
        </RechartsPrimitive.ResponsiveContainer>
      </div>
    </ChartContext.Provider>
  )
})
ChartContainer.displayName = "Chart"

const ChartStyle = ({ id, config }: { id: string; config: ChartConfig }) => {
  const colorConfig = Object.entries(config).filter(
    ([, config]) => config.theme || config.color
  )

  if (!colorConfig.length) {
    return null
  }

  return (
    <style
      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
        __html: Object.entries(THEMES)
          .map(
            ([theme, prefix]) => `
${prefix} [data-chart=${id}] {
${colorConfig
  .map(([key, itemConfig]) => {
    const color =
      itemConfig.theme?.[theme as keyof typeof itemConfig.theme] ||
      itemConfig.color
    return color ? `  --color-${key}: ${color};` : null
  })
  .join("\n")}
}
`
          )
          .join("\n"),
      }}
    />
  )
}

const ChartTooltip = RechartsPrimitive.Tooltip

const ChartTooltipContent = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<typeof RechartsPrimitive.Tooltip> &
    React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
      hideLabel?: boolean
      hideIndicator?: boolean
      indicator?: "line" | "dot" | "dashed"
      nameKey?: string
      labelKey?: string
    }
>(
  (
    {
      active,
      payload,
      className,
      indicator = "dot",
      hideLabel = false,
      hideIndicator = false,
      label,
      labelFormatter,
      labelClassName,
      formatter,
      color,
      nameKey,
      labelKey,
    },
    ref
  ) => {
    const { config } = useChart()

    const tooltipLabel = React.useMemo(() => {
      if (hideLabel || !payload?.length) {
        return null
      }

      const [item] = payload
      const key = `${labelKey || item?.dataKey || item?.name || "value"}`
      const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key)
      const value =
        !labelKey && typeof label === "string"
          ? config[label as keyof typeof config]?.label || label
          : itemConfig?.label

      if (labelFormatter) {
        return (
          <div className={tw.def([labelClassName], {
                fontWeight: "font-medium",
            })}>
            {labelFormatter(value, payload)}
          </div>
        )
      }

      if (!value) {
        return null
      }

      return <div className={tw.def([labelClassName], {
          fontWeight: "font-medium",
      })}>{value}</div>
    }, [
      label,
      labelFormatter,
      payload,
      hideLabel,
      labelClassName,
      config,
      labelKey,
    ])

    if (!active || !payload?.length) {
      return null
    }

    const nestLabel = payload.length === 1 && indicator !== "dot"

    return (
      <div
        ref={ref}
        className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "grid",
            minWidth: "min-w-[8rem]",
            alignItems: "items-start",
            gap: "gap-1.5",
            borderRadius: "rounded-lg",
            borderWidth: ["border", "border-border/50"],
            backgroundColor: "bg-background",
            padding: ["px-2.5", "py-1.5"],
            fontSize: "text-xs",
            boxShadow: "shadow-xl",
        })}
      >
        {!nestLabel ? tooltipLabel : null}
        <div className={tw.style({
                display: "grid",
                gap: "gap-1.5",
            }).class()}>
          {payload
            .filter((item) => item.type !== "none")
            .map((item, index) => {
              const key = `${nameKey || item.name || item.dataKey || "value"}`
              const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key)
              const indicatorColor = color || item.payload.fill || item.color

              return (
                <div
                  key={item.dataKey}
                  className={tw.def([indicator === "dot" && "items-center"], {
                      display: "flex",
                      width: "w-full",
                      flexWrap: "flex-wrap",
                      alignItems: "items-stretch",
                      gap: "gap-2",
                      "[&>svg]": {
                          height: "[&>svg]:h-2.5",
                          width: "[&>svg]:w-2.5",
                          color: "[&>svg]:text-muted-foreground",
                      },
                  })}
                >
                  {formatter && item?.value !== undefined && item.name ? (
                    formatter(item.value, item.name, item, index, item.payload)
                  ) : (
                    <>
                      {itemConfig?.icon ? (
                        <itemConfig.icon />
                      ) : (
                        !hideIndicator && (
                          <div
                            className={tw.def([{
                                                                                  "h-2.5 w-2.5": indicator === "dot",
                                                                                  "w-1": indicator === "line",
                                                                                  "w-0 border-[1.5px] border-dashed bg-transparent":
                                                                                    indicator === "dashed",
                                                                                  "my-0.5": nestLabel && indicator === "dashed",
                                                                                }], {
                                                      flexShrink: "shrink-0",
                                                      borderRadius: "rounded-[2px]",
                                                      borderWidth: "border-[--color-border]",
                                                      backgroundImage: "bg-[--color-bg]",
                                                  })}
                            style={
                              {
                                "--color-bg": indicatorColor,
                                "--color-border": indicatorColor,
                              } as React.CSSProperties
                            }
                          />
                        )
                      )}
                      <div
                        className={tw.def([nestLabel ? "items-end" : "items-center"], {
                                          display: "flex",
                                          justifyContent: "justify-between",
                                          lineHeight: "leading-none",
                                      })}
                      >
                        <div className={tw.style({
                                          display: "grid",
                                          gap: "gap-1.5",
                                      }).class()}>
                          {nestLabel ? tooltipLabel : null}
                          <span className={tw.style({
                                              color: "text-muted-foreground",
                                          }).class()}>
                            {itemConfig?.label || item.name}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        {item.value && (
                          <span className={tw.style({
                                              fontFamily: "font-mono",
                                              fontWeight: "font-medium",
                                              fontVariantNumeric: "tabular-nums",
                                              color: "text-foreground",
                                          }).class()}>
                            {item.value.toLocaleString()}
                          </span>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </>
                  )}
                </div>
              )
            })}
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }
)
ChartTooltipContent.displayName = "ChartTooltip"

const ChartLegend = RechartsPrimitive.Legend

const ChartLegendContent = React.forwardRef<
  HTMLDivElement,
  React.ComponentProps<"div"> &
    Pick<RechartsPrimitive.LegendProps, "payload" | "verticalAlign"> & {
      hideIcon?: boolean
      nameKey?: string
    }
>(
  (
    { className, hideIcon = false, payload, verticalAlign = "bottom", nameKey },
    ref
  ) => {
    const { config } = useChart()

    if (!payload?.length) {
      return null
    }

    return (
      <div
        ref={ref}
        className={tw.def([verticalAlign === "top" ? "pb-3" : "pt-3", className], {
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "items-center",
            justifyContent: "justify-center",
            gap: "gap-4",
        })}
      >
        {payload
          .filter((item) => item.type !== "none")
          .map((item) => {
            const key = `${nameKey || item.dataKey || "value"}`
            const itemConfig = getPayloadConfigFromPayload(config, item, key)

            return (
              <div
                key={item.value}
                className={tw.style({
                    display: "flex",
                    alignItems: "items-center",
                    gap: "gap-1.5",
                    "[&>svg]": {
                        height: "[&>svg]:h-3",
                        width: "[&>svg]:w-3",
                        color: "[&>svg]:text-muted-foreground",
                    },
                }).class()}
              >
                {itemConfig?.icon && !hideIcon ? (
                  <itemConfig.icon />
                ) : (
                  <div
                    className={tw.style({
                                    height: "h-2",
                                    width: "w-2",
                                    flexShrink: "shrink-0",
                                    borderRadius: "rounded-[2px]",
                                }).class()}
                    style={{
                      backgroundColor: item.color,
                    }}
                  />
                )}
                {itemConfig?.label}
              </div>
            )
          })}
      </div>
    )
  }
)
ChartLegendContent.displayName = "ChartLegend"

// Helper to extract item config from a payload.
function getPayloadConfigFromPayload(
  config: ChartConfig,
  payload: unknown,
  key: string
) {
  if (typeof payload !== "object" || payload === null) {
    return undefined
  }

  const payloadPayload =
    "payload" in payload &&
    typeof payload.payload === "object" &&
    payload.payload !== null
      ? payload.payload
      : undefined

  let configLabelKey: string = key

  if (
    key in payload &&
    typeof payload[key as keyof typeof payload] === "string"
  ) {
    configLabelKey = payload[key as keyof typeof payload] as string
  } else if (
    payloadPayload &&
    key in payloadPayload &&
    typeof payloadPayload[key as keyof typeof payloadPayload] === "string"
  ) {
    configLabelKey = payloadPayload[
      key as keyof typeof payloadPayload
    ] as string
  }

  return configLabelKey in config
    ? config[configLabelKey]
    : config[key as keyof typeof config]
}

export {
  ChartContainer,
  ChartTooltip,
  ChartTooltipContent,
  ChartLegend,
  ChartLegendContent,
  ChartStyle,
}
